_doc: Exemptions for lint:route-orphans. Routes listed here are documented in the spec but legitimately have no frontend caller — dev tools, backend-internal infra, cron-driven endpoints, etc. Each entry must include a `reason`. Adding a reason here is a positive act: the human is asserting 'this is backend-only on purpose'. Future-state, every entry here should be auditable by a procurement reviewer.
_format: Add entries to `exemptions` only. Path matches dead-apis.txt verbatim.

exemptions.reason: dev-only reset tool, invoked manually via curl/Postman — no UI
dev-only reset tool, invoked manually — no UI
CSP violation report endpoint — browsers POST automatically, no frontend caller
marker endpoint for redirect flows, called by middleware not UI
password-reset link landing — server-rendered, not apiSite()
kubernetes-style health probe — infra layer, no app caller
kubernetes-style readiness probe — infra layer, no app caller
